projects.name: savannah-i-g/OpenCrawlEngine
projects.description: OpenCrawlEngine is a local, single-player role-playing game engine driven by a language-model game master. It runs on your machine, talks to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint that you supply a key for, stores characters and campaigns in a local SQLite database, and renders a desktop interface built with Dear ImGui.
projects.full_description: OpenCrawlEngine is a local, single-player role-playing game engine driven by a language-model game master. It runs on your machine, talks to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint that you supply a key for, stores characters and campaigns in a local SQLite database, and renders a desktop interface built with Dear ImGui.

projects.name: OpenPj/spring-manifold-next-gen
projects.description: Spring-Manifold Next-Gen is an enterprise data integration and ingestion platform modeled after Apache ManifoldCF. It leverages modern Java 25 features (such as Structured Concurrency and Virtual Threads), Spring Boot, Kafka and vector search infrastructure to orchestrate data flows from various repository connectors to vector search outputs.
projects.full_description: Spring-Manifold Next-Gen is an enterprise data integration and ingestion platform modeled after Apache ManifoldCF. It leverages modern Java 25 features (such as Structured Concurrency and Virtual Threads), Spring Boot, Kafka and vector search infrastructure to orchestrate data flows from various repository connectors to vector search outputs.

projects.name: rxdt/py_ralph_frame
projects.description: Easy scaffold for a gated autonomous agent loop ("Ralph"). No task list and no orchestrator. A dumb Ralph tells an agent "Go!" and hands it a PROMPT. The agent iterates as many times as Ralph makes it. One iteration includes pre-commit gate rules enforcement, specs update, and a push to Github.
projects.full_description: Easy scaffold for a gated autonomous agent loop ("Ralph"). No task list and no orchestrator. A dumb Ralph tells an agent "Go!" and hands it a PROMPT. The agent iterates as many times as Ralph makes it. One iteration includes pre-commit gate rules enforcement, specs update, and a push to Github.
